Tests the immutability of `Number.MIN_VALUE` by asserting that it cannot be deleted.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that tests the immutability of the `Number.MIN_VALUE` property in JavaScript. It uses the `delete` operator to attempt to remove `Number.MIN_VALUE` and asserts that the operation returns `false`, indicating that `Number.MIN_VALUE` is a non-configurable property and cannot be deleted. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on verifying the behavior of the `delete` operator with a specific built-in JavaScript property.
